pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requests these fields, and export_result.sh checks for them.
Task description explicitly requests this fieldset, and export_result.sh checks for it.
Task description explicitly requests this status, and export_result.sh checks for it.
Task description explicitly requests this model, and export_result.sh checks for it.
Task description explicitly requests these asset configurations, setup_task.sh creates these synthetic users, and verifier.py checks these configurations.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated data. The setup_task.sh script injects three synthetic users (John Smith 'jsmith', Mary Jones 'mjones', Tom Lee 'tlee') and prerequisites ('Mobile Devices' category, 'Generic' manufacturer) into the Snipe-IT MariaDB. The target values (expected_custom_fields 'Network MAC Address' and 'Mobile OS Version', expected_fieldset 'BYOD Device Info', expected_status 'BYOD - Approved', expected_model 'Personal Smartphone', and the 3 associated BYOD assets) precisely match the explicit task description instructions and are enforced by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
